audit_scope: tracked production code, CLI, schemas, templates, UI, Makefile, tests, demo fixtures, and public status docs

summary.interpretation: Case fixtures and audit hashes are acceptable when isolated. The blockers are values embedded in active discovery, generation, synthesis, and entrypoint contracts.

items.why: The reusable retrieval-generation module silently discards every other paper ID.
items.minimum_action: Accept allowed source IDs from a case/project manifest.

items.why: The active generation default defines the Case 01 topic.
items.minimum_action: Require or derive the title from project scope.

items.why: The generation prompt rejects citations from a clean-room source set.
items.minimum_action: Render allowed citation/source IDs from the evidence pack.

items.why: Useful deterministic Case 01 fixture, but unsuitable as a generic fallback.
items.minimum_action: Keep as Case 01 fixture; add a manifest-driven generic fallback.

items.why: The taxonomy is a legitimate chemistry case asset and should not be generalized into the core schema.
items.minimum_action: Select it explicitly from the Case 01 manifest.

items.why: A new domain cannot supply its own lightweight vocabulary without editing code.
items.minimum_action: Resolve an optional classification profile from the project manifest.

items.match: allene discovery description and required rules file
items.why: The primary discovery skill advertises and requires the allene taxonomy.
items.minimum_action: Make domain vocabulary an optional project resource.

items.match: allenation is the default rule pack
items.why: A non-allene project inherits allene writing logic unless code/config is changed.
items.minimum_action: Use a neutral default and require explicit Case 01 selection.

items.why: The implementation reinforces the case-specific manifest default.
items.minimum_action: Fail clearly or select a neutral pack when the project does not specify one.

items.match: V3 source groups fixed to three Case 01 papers
items.why: This is frozen Phase 8A method history. Reusing it for Case 02 would be wrong.
items.minimum_action: Leave frozen; exclude from the generic product path.

items.match: V3.1 source IDs and page counts
items.why: Exact source/page expectations are appropriate regression fixtures for the frozen case.
items.minimum_action: Do not migrate these constants into a generic schema.

items.match: V3 source schema enumerates Case 01 paper/source IDs
items.why: The schema documents the frozen V3 case contract, not a product-wide contract.
items.minimum_action: Keep versioned; create a separate case-neutral product schema.

items.why: The current active synthesis validator cannot accept a different case size.
items.minimum_action: Read expected accounting from the selected case manifest.

items.match: fixed three-paper citation map and 44/7 validation
items.why: Correct for the frozen salvage operation, but it cannot serve as the next-case synthesis engine.
items.minimum_action: Keep salvage frozen and add a manifest-driven product renderer.

items.match: fixed closure/V1 run IDs and hashes
items.why: Strong provenance for Case 01; the entrypoint itself is not reusable for a new project.
items.minimum_action: Keep as a Case 01 command and introduce a case-manifest entrypoint.

items.match: fixed salvage source runs and hashes
items.why: The command intentionally rescues one frozen response and should not become a generic entrypoint.
items.minimum_action: Archive under Case 01 documentation; do not generalize.

items.why: Expected fixture identity is appropriate in a named Case 01 demo.
items.minimum_action: Retain and rename/present as Case Study 01.

items.match: Make targets point to allene demo roots
items.why: Regression targets may bind fixtures, but they cannot be the only product command.
items.minimum_action: Keep regression targets; add a case-neutral product target.

items.match: P403 warning required by Bailian preflight
items.why: A generic preflight rejects a sanitized corpus without the Case 01 warning record.
items.minimum_action: Move warning expectations into the Case 01 fixture manifest.

items.why: Useful expected retrieval text for Case 01, not a general retrieval rule.
items.minimum_action: Source hints from each case fixture.

items.why: The limit is a frozen methodological budget, not a universal product policy.
items.minimum_action: Preserve for Case 01; use `human_review_policy` for future projects.

items.match: PR number fixed to 3 in Phase 8 resume
items.why: Historical coordination metadata, not a product field.
items.minimum_action: Leave frozen or remove from future generic reports.

items.why: The statement is now false unless explicitly scoped to the moment Phase 8A closed.
items.minimum_action: Clarify that it was the Phase 8A closure state.

items.match: feature branch described as unmerged after squash merge
items.why: The same document later records PR #3 as squash merged.
items.minimum_action: Remove the contradictory branch status in a later documentation update.

items.why: Portable as a Unix temp path but points to one historical run rather than a project artifact.
items.minimum_action: Require the input through a case manifest or explicit CLI argument.
